name: Firecracker Brownies
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F. Grease an 8-inch square baking pan.
2. In a bowl, stir together butter, sugar, and vanilla. Add eggs; beat well with a spoon.
3. Stir together flour, cocoa, baking powder, and salt in another bowl. Gradually add this mixture to the egg mixture, beating until well blended. Stir in chocolate chips and nuts if desired. Spread batter evenly into the prepared pan.
4. Bake for 40 to 45 minutes or until the brownies begin to pull away from the sides of the pan. Allow to cool completely in the pan on a wire rack. Cut into bars. About 16 brownies.
